aweme_list.desc: Let’s Talk “Remortgage..” 🏡  If your fixed rate is coming to an end in 2025… Don’t panic too much  I come with a big remortgage tip…  This is a quick tip which could save you ALOT of money.  When you apply for a mortgage your interest rate is slightly higher the higher your Loan To Value is (or LTV)  (For context LTV is the amount you are looking to borrow.. example -  You buy a £100,000 property and have a £20,000 deposit… you are borrowing £80,000 - this mean your Loan to value is 80%… because £80,000 of £100,000 is 80%… hope that makes sense..it’s important to understand)  Now lenders will offer better rates the lower your loan to value is… so someone with a 90% LTV might be offered a rate of 5% but someone at 85% LTV might be offered 4.8%..  The Interest Rates with the lenders are set at multiples of 5…  So  95% LTV  90% LTV  85% LTV  80% LTV  75% LTV  70% LTV  You get the point…..  If it works out that your LTV is say 76% - A lender will round you up.. so you will be in the 80% LTV product range. Which means you could be paying a slightly higher interest rate..  So the tip is… Make sure you are aware of your LTV  In the example I gave above…  Let’s say the house is worth £100,000 - you are remortgaging and have an outstanding loan of £76,000 to pay off…  When you remortgage… this would mean you would be remortgaging at 76% LTV (which means you’ll be offered 80% LTV interest rates)  How to get yourself into the 75% LTV product range?  You can say your property is worth £102,000… by simply saying the property is worth a fraction more this could make LARGE savings to your monthly payments.  NOW don’t take the piss… don’t be in a £200,000 home and say to the lenders or your mortgage broker “Yea the house is worth £450,000” when it’s actually worth £200,000 😂 you have to be realistic. Because you’ll get found out.  When you remortgage the lender selected will carry out a survey to make sure the property is worth what you say it is.. if they say “nope its only worth £100,000” then unfortunately you’ll be back on the 80% LTV products.  I hope this makes sense… and if you have any questions. I am a FREE Mortgage Broker 🙌  Make sure you follow for more  #remortgage #ukmortgage #buyingahome #remortgageuk #remortgagetips #remortgagehelp
